# llms.txt — AI crawler guide for aims-sg.com
# This file helps AI models understand and cite your content.
# More at: https://llmstxt.org/

## About AIMS SG
AIMS SG is an Agentic Business Transformation consultancy based in Singapore. We build and deploy autonomous AI agents and multi-agent workflows for SMEs and enterprises, navigate government grants (PSG, EDG), and automate manual business processes.

## Key pages

- Homepage: https://aims-sg.com/
- Agentic AI Audit: https://aims-sg.com/assessment
- Services: https://aims-sg.com/services
- Case Studies: https://aims-sg.com/case-studies
- Blog: https://aims-sg.com/blog
- About: https://aims-sg.com/about
- Contact: https://aims-sg.com/contact

## Structured data

- Organization schema: https://aims-sg.com/schema/organization.json
- Services schema: https://aims-sg.com/schema/services.json
- FAQ schema: /faq (FAQPage schema embedded on page)

## Core topics
AIMS SG specialises in:
- Agentic strategy and autonomous roadmap development
- Business process automation via multi-agent systems
- Agentic suitability and AI readiness audits
- PSG and EDG grant advisory for automation projects
- Custom AI agent implementation and orchestration
- Autonomous workflow deployment and team training
